calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of The Bond
Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Off Calendar

Ex Parte Application For Amended Order Appointing Successor Trustee (Removal Of Bond Requirement)
Off Calendar Aug-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of The Bond
Off Calendar Jul-15-2014 Continued To Sep-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Corey for petitioner.

The court informed counsel that it will not accept a screen shot of the signed waiver. Mr. Corey stated that he suggested to his client to distribute the gift of $1000.00 to Kenneth Carter and present an ex parte application to amend the order to waive bond. Status on filing of bond was continued to September 2, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of The Bond
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Continued To Jul-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Corey for Christian Huff.

Mr. Corey stated that the issue of bond is under review by the Bond Agent, that Ms. Krider has passed away and that Ken Krider sent a copy of a signed waiver by text to his Sister but will not provide it to him (Counsel). Status on filing of bond was continued to July 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel was instructed to file what he has.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
